description: FP regression-guard: dynamic import() INSIDE an async-arrow callback passed to a top-level function call (e.g. next-intl getRequestConfig). The callback fires per-request, not on module load — the function-call-with-callback shape is NOT an IIFE. v0181 first-application battle-test surfaced this on Spa-App. persistence-pattern-checker MUST NOT fire CWE-829 (IIFE-vs-callback discriminator).
